description: novostavby.ai is a Czech property portal that aggregates new residential development projects, unit availability, prices, and related market information. It offers searchable listings, project and developer pages, and an AI assistant for homebuyers.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for novostavby.ai; the site appears to be a consumer-facing real-estate listing and AI search service, with only a public `llms.txt` file discovered.
